pi_items.source: Consistent across setup_task.sh, export_result.sh, and verifier.py
DXF AutoCAD Color Index standard: 0=Black (RGB 0,0,0), 7=White (RGB 255,255,255). Verified via https://gohtx.com/acadcolors.php. Verifier.py checks: l.color in [0, 7]
Task description states 'Draw a 200x200mm square on the STOCK layer'
DXF AutoCAD Color Index standard: 1=Red (RGB 255,0,0). Verified via https://gohtx.com/acadcolors.php. Verifier.py checks: l.color == 1
Task description states gasket geometry (circles for holes) should be on CUT layer
DXF AutoCAD Color Index standard: 5=Blue (RGB 0,0,255). Verified via https://gohtx.com/acadcolors.php. Verifier.py checks: l.color == 5
Task description states 'Add text G-01 on the ETCH layer'. Verifier.py checks for TEXT/MTEXT on ETCH layer with 'G-01' content
Task description: 'Draw a 200x200mm square on the STOCK layer'. Verifier.py checks for width and height ~200mm (tolerance ±5mm)
Task description: 'Outer Diameter 80mm'. Verifier.py checks for circles with radius ~40 (diameter 80) on CUT layer
Task description: 'Inner Diameter 50mm'. Verifier.py checks for circles with radius ~25 (diameter 50) on CUT layer
Task description: 'four 6mm bolt holes on a 65mm bolt circle'. Value is used for positioning bolt holes. Geometrically valid: 50mm < 65mm < 80mm (fits between ID and OD)
Task description: 'four 6mm bolt holes'. Verifier.py checks for circles with radius ~3 (diameter 6) on CUT layer
Task description: 'Create 4 copies of this gasket'. Verifier.py expects 4 outer circles, 4 inner circles, and 16 bolt holes (4×4)

privileged_info_summary: The task is a synthetic gasket drawing specification for LibreCAD. All geometric specifications are verified internally consistent and match task description: 200x200mm stock square, gasket design with 80mm OD, 50mm ID, 6mm bolt holes on 65mm bolt circle, quantity 4. DXF color index mappings verified correct: STOCK layer colors [0=Black, 7=White], CUT layer color [1=Red], ETCH layer color [5=Blue]. Output path confirmed as /home/ga/Documents/LibreCAD/gasket_nesting.dxf. Geometry nesting constraint (4 gaskets fit in 200x200mm stock) verified feasible.
